style_a.name: 港片复古胶片
style_a.prompt_suffix: Wong Kar-wai style, high contrast, heavy film grain, red and green neon glow, warm yellow tones, anamorphic lens, claustrophobic framing, Hong Kong retro 1990s aesthetic

style_b.name: 茶山奇幻古风
style_b.prompt_suffix: lush green tea mountain, ethereal mist, golden sunrise, traditional Chinese fantasy, flowing hanfu robes, vibrant saturated colors, epic aerial landscape, dreamy oriental mythology

music_sync.lyrics: 挤过人群 像透明的空气 / 谁能看见 裂缝中的光

atmosphere.overall_mood: 拥挤街头延时摄影中唯一清晰的身影——人群如潮水般模糊流过，只有他是真实的

video_prompt: Wong Kar-wai step-printed slow motion: a solitary man walking through a crowded Hong Kong street at night, he is sharp and clear while all other pedestrians are motion-blurred streaks of color, neon reflections on wet pavement, heavy film grain, anamorphic, 16:9, 15s.

bgm.description: 主歌第二段，旋律略有上扬但仍压抑
bgm.instruments: 木吉他、轻弦乐、低音鼓微弱心跳

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 港风街头广角——拥挤的行人潮，所有人都模糊（延时/抽帧效果），唯有画面中央一个身影清晰
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 他是人海中唯一静止清晰的存在
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 人群嘈杂声被模糊处理
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Wide angle Hong Kong neon-lit street at night, dense crowd of pedestrians all motion-blurred into ghostly streaks, only one figure in the center is sharp and clear - a young man in a vintage dark suit walking alone, long exposure light trail effect on the crowd, Wong Kar-wai step-printed timelapse technique, film grain, anamorphic, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 主角在模糊人流中缓步前行——人群如河流样从他身边涌过，他仿佛与世界不在同一速度
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 人群围绕却无人注意——透明的存在
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Medium tracking shot of a lonely man in vintage suit walking slowly through a Hong Kong neon street, all surrounding pedestrians are motion-blurred streams flowing past him like a river, he exists in a different time speed, red and green neon reflections on wet ground, Wong Kar-wai signature isolation technique, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 俯拍——人群从四面八方涌来又散去，主角如岩石般站在人流正中
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 俯视的疏离感——人群如蚂蚁，他是异类
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 延时摄影加速的城市声
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Overhead bird's eye view of a crowded Hong Kong intersection at night, hundreds of motion-blurred pedestrians streaming in all directions, one figure standing perfectly still in the center like a rock in a river, neon signs glowing, rain-wet pavement reflecting lights, Wong Kar-wai overhead timelapse shot, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 主角抬头——在模糊的灯光和人流中，看到一道微弱的光从天空裂缝中透下
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 阴暗天空中一道裂缝透出异样光芒
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Low angle shot looking up past a man's face as he gazes skyward in a Hong Kong neon alley, between the dense buildings a crack of light appears in the dark sky, a thin beam of golden-green light descending from above, neon signs framing the narrow sky view, Wong Kar-wai looking-up shot, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 特写——主角的脸被那道光照亮一半，另一半仍在霓虹阴影中，眼中闪烁微光
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 半光半影——两个世界的分界从脸上开始
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Close-up portrait of a young man's face half-lit by a golden-green beam from above and half in neon shadow, his eyes reflecting a faint supernatural light, split lighting creating a dramatic divide between hope and despair, Wong Kar-wai intimate portrait, high contrast, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 主角开始加速前行——在模糊人群中逆流而上，步伐从缓慢变为坚定
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 从被动的透明存在变为主动的逆流者
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Tracking shot of a man in vintage suit walking with increasing speed against the flow of motion-blurred pedestrians in a Hong Kong neon alley, his determination visible in his posture as he moves counter to the crowd stream, neon light trails, Wong Kar-wai kinetic chase energy, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 主角在人群边缘奔跑——雨水被脚步溅起，霓虹灯在地面水洼中变形
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 奔跑——从行走到奔跑的转变
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Low angle side tracking shot of a man in vintage suit running through a rain-soaked Hong Kong neon street, water splashing from his footsteps, colorful neon reflections distorted in puddles, motion blur on the background, desperate running energy, Wong Kar-wai Chungking Express chase style, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 主角在奔跑中——人群突然全部消失，他一个人站在空旷的霓虹街道中央

characters.name: 创作者A
characters.action: 停下脚步，站在空旷街道

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 人群消失——世界只剩他和霓虹，超现实瞬间
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 突然安静，仅有霓虹嗡鸣
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A man standing alone in the center of a suddenly empty Hong Kong neon street, all pedestrians vanished, only him and the glowing neon signs remaining, wet pavement reflecting infinite neon colors, surreal lonely moment, eerie silence after chaos, Wong Kar-wai surreal isolation, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 空旷街道的地面开始微微震动——霓虹灯管开始闪烁不稳，远处传来低沉的轰鸣，什么东西要来了
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 暴风雨前的宁静——世界即将崩裂
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 低频轰鸣声、霓虹灯管闪烁电流声
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A man standing in an empty Hong Kong neon street that is beginning to shake, neon signs flickering unstably, the ground vibrating, a deep rumble approaching from the distance, tension building as reality begins to fracture, amber and green light pulses, Wong Kar-wai pre-climax tension, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio
